title: Replace silent error-swallowing with typed throws
task: `extract` in src/extract.js currently swallows every bad path by returning undefined, hiding real failures. Harden it per the spec comment above the function: throw TypeError when raw is not a string, let invalid JSON surface as a SyntaxError, throw TypeError when the parsed value is not a plain object (arrays and null do not count), and throw RangeError when the requested key is absent. A present key whose value is falsy/null/undefined must still be returned, not treated as missing. Do not modify the tests. Run the tests to verify.
notes: Each error path has its own test (TypeError/SyntaxError/RangeError) plus the falsy-value happy path, so a partial fix fails. file_not_contains removes the swallow; the test pin blocks a rewrite.
